summary: Iteration 67 - All 6 reported issues (3 bugs + 3 improvements) verified as FIXED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All dialogs working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 issues verified fixed. mark-paid returns 200. Johan Michelazzi excluded from late payments. Audrey Bernard has correct due_date 2026-03-01. Renewal with 'Sans engagement' sets subscription_end_date to null. CAC uses marketing_spend. Bilans completion form has nutrition_score 1-10 clickable scale.

bug_1_mark_paid_500_error.description: POST /api/payments/{id}/mark-paid now returns 200 with status=paid and transaction_created=true
bug_1_mark_paid_500_error.evidence: Backend test passed: mark-paid returned 200 with {status: 'paid', transaction_created: true}. Frontend: 72 'Payé' buttons visible, dialog opens correctly.
bug_1_mark_paid_500_error.root_cause_fix: recalculate_month was split into route handler (with Depends) + standalone function (without Depends)

bug_2_johan_michelazzi_in_late_payments.description: GET /api/payments/late no longer contains Johan Michelazzi (departed member)
bug_2_johan_michelazzi_in_late_payments.evidence: Backend test passed: Johan Michelazzi not found in late payments list. Johan has multiple entries with past exit_dates.

bug_3_audrey_bernard_billing_cycle.description: Billing cycle 'interval_days' calculates due dates from contract_signed_date correctly
bug_3_audrey_bernard_billing_cycle.evidence: Backend test passed: Audrey Bernard (contract 2025-10-27, interval 25 days) has due_date 2026-03-01 (NOT 2026-03-25)

improvement_4_renewal_sans_engagement.description: POST /api/members/{id}/renew with 'Sans engagement' and new_end_date=null sets subscription_end_date to null
improvement_4_renewal_sans_engagement.evidence: Backend test passed: Renewal with 'Sans engagement' successfully set subscription_end_date to null. Frontend: Renewal dialog has 'Sans engagement' option in dropdown (code verified at line 239 of MembersPage.js)

improvement_5_cac_marketing_spend.description: CAC calculation in compute_metrics uses marketing_spend field
improvement_5_cac_marketing_spend.evidence: Backend test passed: CAC = (marketing_spend + ad_spend) / close. Code verified at line 159 of models/kpi.py

improvement_6_bilans_nutrition_score.description: Bilans completion form has nutrition_score field with 1-10 clickable scale
improvement_6_bilans_nutrition_score.evidence: Frontend test passed: Bilan completion dialog shows 'Score nutrition (1-10)' with input field and 10 clickable buttons (1-10 scale). Screenshot shows the nutrition section with scale buttons.
